return(function(t,n,f,q,o,J,T,s,a,E,v,N,M,r,Z,V,p,b,X,h,I,z,u)M,I,X,v,r,h,Z,u,b,p,a,E,z,s,V,N=function()E=(-983869-(-983870))+E b[E]=-121135-(-121136)return E end,function(t,c)local n=u(c)local
